# ODH-ADR-0004: opendatahub-style filename

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-07

## Context

Filename convention `ODH-ADR-0004-opendatahub-style.md` — a repeated, project-specific letter prefix before the number. Found running duckadrift's R5 calibration corpus against opendatahub-io/architecture-decision-records.

## Decision

Recognize this as ADR number 4.

## Consequences

None — fixture file for filename-convention parsing, not a Tier 0 check.
